title: Defence Direction and Guidance for Training and Education provides the top-level policy framework governing all military training including EW Systems training

body:

title: Question 1 of 1
body: Which of the following is a key requirement for: Defence Direction and Guidance for Training and Education b DTSM 2024 Edition DSAT Training Support Manual c RolePS 008/21 V1 Role Performance Statement – TA Operator Class 1 d FTS 2303C V1 Formal Training Statement – EW Systems Operator Class 1 Definitions and Abbreviations Abbreviation Definition AATAM All Arms Tactical Aide Memoire AESP Army Equipment Support Publication BMD Basic Military Document CES Complete Equipment Schedule CoC Chain of Command CSCM Counter Surveillance Control Measures?

_items.text: Defence Direction and Guidance for Training and Education provides the top-level policy framework...
Report to the chain of command at regular intervals

_feedback._correct: Correct. This is a key requirement for Defence Direction and Guidance for Training and Education b DTSM 2024 Edition DSAT Training Support Manual c RolePS 008/21 V1 Role Performance Statement – TA Operator Class 1 d FTS 2303C V1 Formal Training Statement – EW Systems Operator Class 1 Definitions and Abbreviations Abbreviation Definition AATAM All Arms Tactical Aide Memoire AESP Army Equipment Support Publication BMD Basic Military Document CES Complete Equipment Schedule CoC Chain of Command CSCM Counter Surveillance Control Measures.

_incorrect.final: Incorrect. The correct answer relates to: Defence Direction and Guidance for Training and Education provides the top-level policy framework...
